description:
The Modrinth App is a unique, open source Minecraft launcher that allows you to play your favorite mods, and keep them up to date, all in one neat little package.


Added
- Added log spam detection and line compacting logic to prevent Modrinth App from crashing when viewing large log files.

Changed
- Increased the default memory for instances from 2GB to 4GB (depending on your system memory).
- Improved "Java installation" settings page design. Thanks @creeperkatze
